Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action

Class FlixelAnalogAxisBinding

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelAnalogAxisBinding
public final class FlixelAnalogAxisBinding extends Object
One contributor to a FlixelActionAnalog vector. Combine several bindings: WASD-style FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.Kind.KEY_NEG_X, FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.Kind.KEY_POS_X, and stick channels FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.Kind.GAMEPAD_AXIS_X / FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.Kind.GAMEPAD_AXIS_Y for the same physical stick on a slot.

Create bindings only during setup. Gamepad axes use FlixelGamepadInput logical constants; Flixel.gamepads applies the same dead zone as the rest of a game.

    • gamepadAxisX

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelAnalogAxisBinding gamepadAxisX(int gamepadSlot, int logicalAxis)
      Adds the X component of a stick (or single axis read as X only).
      Parameters:
      gamepadSlot - 0.. slot index.
      logicalAxis - FlixelGamepadInput.AXIS_LEFT_X or similar.

    • gamepadAxisY

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelAnalogAxisBinding gamepadAxisY(int gamepadSlot, int logicalAxis)
      Adds the Y component of a stick.
      Parameters:
      gamepadSlot - 0.. slot index.
      logicalAxis - FlixelGamepadInput.AXIS_LEFT_Y or similar.
